system.text: scv is a transparent terminal coding agent written in Rust. The LLM supplies only tokens; scv owns the agentic loop, the tool registry, the permission gate, and session persistence. Tools include read, glob, grep, write, edit, bash, web_fetch, and transcript_search. The permission gate is fail-closed: side-effecting tools require human approval before they run. scv is a transparent terminal coding agent written in Rust.
